proposed_improvements: Require secret-scan commands to be fully reproducible from repository files only (no /tmp allowlists).
Require tests to cover optional sensitive-setting branches (e.g., conditional Key Vault references).
Require workflow-auth tests to enforce OIDC variable usage across every workflow that uses azure/login.
Require workflow-auth tests to assert azure/login never regresses to creds: or client-secret based login.
